item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Kebijakan yang hanya fokus pada kepentingan masyarakat bisa justru membuat ketimpangan semakin besar.

notes: Agent A begins with mild support for society-priority but with a balance caveat, then shifts toward minority-rights and uneven-enforcement concerns. Agent B remains mostly balanced and rights-oriented, conceding implementation problems while treating enforcement as the core issue rather than rejecting collective welfare.
